report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides — Stacks & sBTC Bitcoin Smart Contracts (829 lines) and Liquid Restaking Tokens Compared weETH vs rsETH vs ezETH (842 lines) — with full SEO metadata, structured data schemas, FAQ sections, and internal linking. Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Stacks & sBTC: Bitcoin L2 with Clarity smart contracts, sBTC at ~$308M TVL (DefiLlama), STX at $0.26 (#101), Fireblocks integration Feb 2026, Satoshi Upgrades roadmap (ZK self-custodial minting, Dual Stacking, Programmable BTC Vaults), 500M STX endowment fund

Liquid Restaking Tokens: Ether.fi weETH leads at $2.8B+ TVL, Kelp/KernelDAO rsETH at $2B+ across 10+ chains with $40M ecosystem fund and Kred RWA initiative, Renzo ezETH at ~$1B+ with cross-chain focus, key risks include AVS slashing and Pendle PT/YT shock propagation

sections.title: Content Created
items: Stacks & sBTC Bitcoin Smart Contracts Guide 2026 — 829 lines, ~3500 words, 10 sections covering PoX consensus, Clarity language, sBTC mechanics, Satoshi Upgrades, DeFi ecosystem (ALEX, Arkadiko, StackingDAO, Velar), competitive comparison table (sBTC vs WBTC vs tBTC vs Babylon), 6 FAQs, 6 related resource links

Liquid Restaking Tokens Compared 2026 — 842 lines, ~3500 words, 10 sections covering LRT mechanics, EigenLayer/AVS flow, deep dives on Ether.fi/Kelp/Renzo, head-to-head comparison table (TVL, chains, fees, features), DeFi strategies (Pendle, Aave, Morpho), risk assessment, decision framework, 6 FAQs, 6 related resource links

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Stacks page: title 'Stacks & sBTC Guide 2026: Bitcoin Smart Contracts, DeFi & the Satoshi Upgrades | degen0x', target keywords 'stacks sbtc guide / bitcoin smart contracts / bitcoin l2', Article + FAQ JSON-LD schemas, OG image via /api/og, Twitter card, Breadcrumb navigation

LRT page: title 'Liquid Restaking Tokens Compared 2026: weETH vs rsETH vs ezETH — Best LRT Guide | degen0x', target keywords 'liquid restaking tokens / weETH vs rsETH / best LRT 2026', Article + FAQ JSON-LD schemas, OG image via /api/og, Twitter card, Breadcrumb navigation
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in src/lib/published-pages.ts
Internal linking: 6 related resources per page connecting to existing learn guides and tools
